How about you?
Yeah, same.
I actually didn't do that much.

On Monday.

I used to, honestly.
Now I don't.

So I usually do the highlights.

But no, not since COVID, my whole sport watching.

then same with, I don't watch that many Lakers game anymore.

But the Lakers, I know Doncic is looking a little more fit this season, so that's good.
No, he's lost a lot of weight.
No, no, for sure.
No, I mean, I would say if my team is doing really well, 100%.
So like, but they're not.
At least in college football.
So it's like UCLA.
So it's like, whatever.

I know, I know.
All right.
Yeah.

I think we can, we can just get organized around logistics.
Let me know if you have any questions.

I'll give you some context.

So some of the context is we have – so the area that I think we're leaning on towards having you guys help us is kind of the idea of how can you help us support and amplify our efforts on, like, use cases.
I love that.
So N8N, one of our competitors, is doing just a tremendous amount with regards to how they're showing up on different platforms and community sites with just different use cases.
They're leaning on their UGC and influencer created to do that.
So that's an area where we're just lacking and we haven't put a lot of effort and time into.

And the reason why it took a little bit longer is we had to first get alignment with Wade, like, is a worthwhile investment that we're going to lean towards use case virality and getting it out in the world.
And the other one is we actually have a person on the PMM team who was kind of leading this effort, but from, like, creating different use cases.
Her role is shifting.
So, like, the reason it took a lot of time to figure out, okay, what is she going to do?
Who's going to then jump in and kind of own this work with you guys and, like, lead it forward?
So I think we have a team now.
So it's going to be, and I'll set a calendar invite.
One of them is going to be Danielle, who essentially was the old PMM overseeing use cases, but she has a lot of just knowledge that she can help and provide.
The other one is going to be Janine.
So she's actually on our content team, and she's also dealt with a lot of use case template creation in the past.
So she has a lot of institutional knowledge of what has worked and what hasn't.
And then Danny, who is our product growth.
So he's on the product side.
He oversees growth.
And so I think those three people are probably the right one to kick off a meeting with.
And then we can figure out that they all need to be involved, that they're not.
Like, once you guys have a good sense of what needs to happen, they can say, all right, well, we don't need you guys anymore.
We're going to run with and then update you guys on, like, a weekly basis.
basis.
We're

So I'm going to do that today and I'll share it in our Slack channel just so you can get a sense of like, okay, what are we actually trying to achieve?
What do we have in our arsenal?

And then we'd love for you guys to push back on any of the stuff that we write and then if you're like, no, it's agreement, you know, we can, you know, growthx can like lean here and own this thing, then figure, okay, what does like the cost look like?
It'll be essentially like the SOW is what I'm trying to put together.
Like, okay, this is what we agree we should do this for the next like, I don't know, two to three months, well, possibly the end of the year and see can we get any traction?

So we have the team.

have to kind of like put it all together, throw it to ChatGBT, clean it up, put it one pager together and then share it with you.

for me?

I think just agreeing on like what is that.

All you have to do is essentially like authenticate the app so you have whatever tech stack that you're using.
We have some definition of like the workflow and then just overview what it is and what it actually does.

is awesome.
Zapier domain and find different ways to talk about it.

So this is used for free.

And there's a market share.
So because of that, a lot of these folks will then go and promote it as well on their channel.
We don't really have that.
Like we don't, we can't really sell it.
I mean, that's, I would say that's fair game for you guys.
Like, hey, we actually recommend building a marketplace.
And that's one way to actually get some growth out of it.
that's why Danny and our product team is going to be involved in this conversation too.
Because if.

You have no idea what it is.

Yeah, it's super helpful.
It makes a lot of sense.

That's...

So this is a little different.
mean, not to say it's out of our wheelhouse, it's just a little different.

That talks about lead management.
And that's a place where I'm seeing NNN do really well.

Like, okay, great.

We probably don't have a solid coverage, honestly, when you look at like the use cases that we have.
So, yeah.
Yeah.
And then one other use case that could be interesting, like, does the team feel like they need any help around?
And editorial or refresh.

So, you know, whether that's your blog section, whether that's creating like a guide section, I know we're going to focus on these templates as like the main use case, but what about the editorial or refresh side?
I would say it's probably lower, but I think when we do the kickoff call, that's why Janine, she oversees like our content blog side of this house.
She could probably provide more information there.
Yeah, well, let's do 45 minutes with Danielle for sure.
And then I think Janine for sure.

Like where do they feel like they need help from GrowthX?
What can GrowthX provide as a service?
And then at that point, at that point, we'd be able

Do you have, this Wednesday at 10 a.m.
Pacific time, what does your calendar look like?

I'm going to be good, for sure, just a matter of Marcel, I think, Marcel, he's got a meeting, but I think he should be able to get it, I mean, I, I would, I would imagine this is going to take priority, so let's, if 10 a.m.
Pacific is open, let's, let's lock that in, yeah.
Yeah, let me, okay, I will, I will add you into this calendar and the team, and then.
And add Marcel, too, and I'll give him context.
I will add Marcel.

Perfect.
Okay, I'll set that calendar.
Yeah, and don't work too hard on like whatever doc you're putting together.

Yeah, think it's more like links and resources.
That we might want to take a look at before Wednesday.

No, no, no, Will Angela or will it be someone that we haven't met?

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on partnership strategy between GrowthX and Zapier, focusing on use case amplification and virality.](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Zapier aims to boost awareness and traffic to their template/use case pages, competing with N8N's aggressive strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
  - [GrowthX's role may include creating new use cases, driving traffic, and potentially developing a marketplace strategy](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Key Zapier team members (Danielle, Janine, Danny) will join a 45-min kickoff meeting on Wednesday at 10am PT to define project scope](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Topics

### Zapier's Use Case Strategy

  - [Focus on marketing, HR, and IT use cases](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Current challenge: lack of awareness and distribution of existing templates](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Zapier has created collections (e.g., AI workflows for marketing executives) but struggles with visibility](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [N8N's success factors:](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Aggressive presence on platforms like Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
      - [Paid influencers and community engagement](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [Marketplace allowing experts to sell templates (revenue share model)](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=613.0)

### GrowthX Partnership Scope

  - [Primary goal: Create virality and distribution for Zapier's use cases](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Secondary goal: Develop new templates and use cases where gaps exist](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Potential areas:](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
      - [Driving traffic to existing template pages](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
      - [Creating new use cases (e.g., lead management)](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
      - [Exploring marketplace strategy (similar to N8N)](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
      - [Possible editorial refresh of blog/guide sections (lower priority)](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Project Team and Logistics

  - [Key Zapier team members:](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
    1.  Danielle: Former PMM overseeing use cases
    2.  Janine: Content team member with use case template experience
    3.  Danny: Product growth lead (optional attendee)
  - [Kaveh to create one-page problem/solution document and share in Slack](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Executive sponsorship: Kaveh or Angela (to be confirmed), with Wade's alignment](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kaveh to send calendar invite for Wednesday 10am PT meeting with GrowthX and Zapier team](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Kaveh to share one-page problem/solution document and relevant links in Slack channel](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=258.0)
  - [Tyler to brief Marcel on meeting context](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Conduct 45-minute kickoff meeting to define project scope and GrowthX's role](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Post-meeting: Finalize Statement of Work (SoW) and get necessary approvals](https://fathom.video/share/s61RsrJS8TkYvjaKUrY7sKQ5q9zjpa46?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)

action_items.description: Create 1-pg prob/soln doc w/ links to existing docs on use templates. Share in Slack.
Send calendar invite for Wed 10AM PT mtg. Add Tyler, Marcel, Danielle, Janine, Danny (opt).
Brief Marcel on mtg context & ensure his attendance for Wed 10AM PT call.
Add Danielle, Janine, Danny to GrowthX Slack channel for project comms.
Discuss exec sponsorship w/ Angela in 1:1. Determine if Angela or Kaveh will sponsor.
